headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences expands operations into Central Europe markets

headlines.headline: Prynis Systems completes planned facility upgrade in Latin America

sentiment.reasoning: Completing a facility upgrade is an operational milestone that likely improves efficiency but is already expected.

headlines.headline: Prynis Systems recalls products in cloud infrastructure line due to quality concerns

headlines.headline: Relvos Biosciences names new head of digital payments division

sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head is a standard leadership change with neutral to slightly positive sentiment depending on the hire's background.

sentiment.reasoning: Opening a new office represents a minor operational expansion with limited immediate financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
